/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libanalyser.so -o libanalyser.so CMakeFiles/analyser.dir/histogram_measurement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analyser.dir/pair_measurment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analyser.dir/Analyser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analyser.dir/InSituMeasurements.cpp.o  /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
